product_title: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: No leaks, great price
reviews.body: Very happy with my purchase, the spindrifts came undamaged and there was no leakage, these are a great price! My husband and I did not like the mango flavour, it was yucky.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Better choice than soda
reviews.body: 4 different flavors. Nice, clean and refreshing. Carbonation is a plus if you are trying to stop from drinking sodas.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Great buy! Love it!
reviews.body: Very good drink. I have tetrology of fallot a heart condition and I've been needing a drink thats sweet but wont spikes my surgar up and it has now no sodium with only 1gram of sugar and no added sugar, this drink is perfect for me. Its the best sparkling water in a can ive ever even liked. This will be my main drink besides regular water.i just got this big 20pack variety mix and I had a great experience all 20 sparkling waters was there and all the flavors that was ordered was there. I didnt have any issues with anything at all. I will definitely be buying more.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: most recent shipment still arrived with liquid damage and a burst can
reviews.body: This variety pack includes 20 cans of sparkling water flavored with real squeezed fruit. I’ve been drinking these regularly and appreciate the cleaner, more natural fruit taste compared to many other canned sparkling beverages. The flavors are distinct and not overly sweet. This recent order was also packaged more carefully than most canned drinks I’ve received. Pros Noticeably better taste than typical sparkling waters; the real fruit gives it a more authentic flavor Good variety of flavors in one pack Each 20-pack comes in its own dedicated cardboard product box, which is then placed inside a separate Amazon shipping box Packaging approach is better than many other canned beverages that are often shipped loose or in thin trays Convenient 12 oz can size Cons Despite the improved packaging, my most recent shipment still arrived with liquid damage and a burst can (see pics) - Amazon sending replacement without a hassle One can had exploded and soaked part of the box (see attached photo), suggesting damage during shipping or handling When a can fails, it can affect the surrounding packaging and presentation Bottom Line This is one of the better-tasting sparkling water options available, especially if you prefer real fruit flavor instead of artificial-tasting alternatives. The manufacturer’s internal packaging is better than most beverages shipped through Amazon, but shipping damage can still occur. If your shipment arrives intact, it’s an excellent product—but it’s worth checking the cans immediately upon delivery.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Disappointed- tastes sour
reviews.body: Bought this because I thought this was a healthier alternative to the flavored waters out there. While it is healthier- no artificial crap in it- I don't like the taste. The lime and lemon taste very sour/tart. The Mango Orange doesn't taste anything like Mango, and I normally love anything Mango (the fruit). The grapefruit is the only one that tastes like the name. It probably tastes decent only because it has 3g of sugar in it. I'm very disappointed because 1- they were expensive compared to other flavored waters and 2- they don't taste very good. I can probably stomach the Grapefruit and the Mango Orange but the 2 Lime ones are SOUR. Giving it 3 stars because it IS healthier as it doesn't have crap ingredients. But sadly, I don't like the taste.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Just delightful
reviews.body: Love Spindrift! These are my favorite sparkling waters because you can taste the real fruit without added sugar. I have tried other brands that end up giving off a sort of chemical or artificial aftertaste, but not these. Spindrift is my go-to for an afternoon refresher or reward after a bunch of Sunday chores. They're also festive for social occasions when I don't feel like drinking alcohol and don't want sugary soda or plain water. I appreciate the four flavors (whichever one I'm drinking at the time seems to be the one I like the best), and for a 12-pack at $15.98 (at time of review), this is a phenomenal deal.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Flavor for the Whole Family
reviews.body: Not only do I love Spindrift, so does my daughter and all of her friends - and this variety pack has a flavor for everyone! It’s so great to have sugar free options like Spindrift 💜
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Interesting taste
reviews.body: Was an okay product, just wasn't what I expected. Could of used more fruit juice in product. Can faintly taste the mixer of fruits. But okay.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: Easy switch from soda during the day
reviews.body: I started keeping a few of these in the fridge for afternoons when I’d usually reach for a soda. The first one I grabbed had a light fruit taste that didn’t feel fake or too sweet, which made it easy to keep drinking. I ended up trying a couple different cans over the next few days, and each one felt a little different without getting boring. It worked well with lunch or just on its own when I wanted something cold and fizzy. I did notice some flavors are lighter than others, so a few felt more subtle than I expected. Still, it made cutting back on sugary drinks feel a lot more doable.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)

reviews.title: The price through Amazon was cheaper than Walmart
reviews.body: Of the 4 flavors my least favorite was grapefruit and my favorite was mango. I would purchase again.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Variety Pack, Made with Real Squeezed Fruit, 12 Fl Oz (Pack of 20)
